functional_requirements.requirement: The watch changes mode from 'Display' to 'change hour' when the mode button is pressed once.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: When you press once on the mode button, the watch changes to “change hour”.

functional_requirements.requirement: Pressing the advance button increments the hour by a unit each time it is pressed in 'change hour' mode.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Every time you press the advance button, the hour is incremented by a unit;

functional_requirements.requirement: The watch changes mode from 'change hour' to 'change minute' when the mode button is pressed again.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: When you press the mode button again, the watch changes to “change minute”.

functional_requirements.requirement: Pressing the advance button increments the minutes by a unit each time it is pressed in 'change minute' mode.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Every time you press on the advance button, the minutes are incremented by a unit.

functional_requirements.requirement: The watch face can be lit by pressing the light button and remains lit until the button is released.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: A light button; by pressing it, the watch face is lit until the button is released;

functional_requirements.requirement: An alarm feature can be added to the digital watch using the alarm button.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: An alarm button, which adds a standard feature to the digital watch...

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
Let’s consider a simplified digital watch:
1. The current mode is the “Display” mode;
2. When you press once on the mode button, the watch changes to “change
hour”. Every time you press the advance button, the hour is incremented by a
unit;
3. When you press the mode button again, the watch changes to “change
minute”. Every time you press on the advance button, the minutes are
incremented by a unit.
• A light button; by pressing it, the watch face is lit until the button is released;
• An alarm button, which adds a standard feature to the digital watch, as described
in the first exercise of this chapter (alarm clock).
>>>
